Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David M. Kritzer, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Xerox Corporation
Edward Tinson, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Thelen LLP

AFTER HEARING, Plaintiff Xerox Corporation's Ex Parte Application For Temporary Protective Order IS GRANTED - Undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.00. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
